training_status: Lifts 3-4x per week, cardio 2-3x per week

benefits.description: Lost 60 lbs over approximately 11 months (300 to 240 lbs) on tirz; additional 2 lbs lost in 2 weeks after adding MOTS-C and AOD
Noticed a subtle energy shift since adding AOD

side_effects.description: Cagrilintide caused far more appetite suppression than bargained for; struggled to hit protein goals

protocol_notes: Started tirz last April at 300 lbs, stalled at ~240 for two months, then added MOTS-C and AOD two weeks ago. Dropped to 238. Briefly trialed cagrilintide for appetite suppression but discontinued due to excessive suppression affecting protein intake. Eats clean whole foods, limits processed sugar, does not track calories precisely.
